category_sources: source_facts.description: Class Library for High Energy Physics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo use the CLHEP project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official CERN CLHEP project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.cern.ch/CLHEP/CLHEP; per instructions repo is null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a high-energy physics class library; source_facts.repo is hosted on CERN GitLab.
